Hero.title: Issues
Hero.subtitle: Default issue backlog rendered from the SDK predefined page.

Table.data: {[{ id: 'ISS-101', title: 'Login form validation fails on empty password', priority: 'High', status: 'Open', assignee: 'Alice' }, { id: 'ISS-102', title: 'Dashboard widgets load in the wrong order', priority: 'Medium', status: 'In Progress', assignee: 'Bruno' }, { id: 'ISS-103', title: 'Export endpoint times out for large datasets', priority: 'Critical', status: 'Blocked', assignee: 'Carla' }, { id: 'ISS-104', title: 'Notification badge is not cleared after read', priority: 'Low', status: 'Done', assignee: 'Diego' }]}
